# JSObjectSetPropertyForKey(_:_:_:_:_:_:)

**Function**

Sets a property on an object using a JavaScript value as the property key.

## Declaration

```swift
func JSObjectSetPropertyForKey(_ ctx: JSContextRef!, _ object: JSObjectRef!, _ propertyKey: JSValueRef!, _ value: JSValueRef!, _ attributes: JSPropertyAttributes, _ exception: UnsafeMutablePointer<JSValueRef?>!)
```

## Parameters

- **ctx**: The execution context to use.
- **object**: The [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSObjectRef] with the property you want to set.
- **propertyKey**: A [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueRef] that contains the property key to use when looking up the property.
- **value**: A [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueRef] to use as the property’s value.
- **attributes**: A set of [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSPropertyAttributes] to give to the property.
- **exception**: A pointer to a [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValueRef] to store an exception in, if any. Pass `NULL` to discard any exception.

## Discussion

This function is the same as performing `object[propertyKey] = value` from JavaScript.

## Working with Objects

- **JSObjectCallAsConstructor(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Calls an object as a constructor.
- **JSObjectCallAsFunction(_:_:_:_:_:_:)**: Calls an object as a function.
- **JSObjectCopyPropertyNames(_:_:)**: Gets the names of an object’s enumerable properties.
- **JSObjectDeleteProperty(_:_:_:_:)**: Deletes a property from an object.
- **JSObjectGetPrivate(_:)**: Gets an object’s private data.
- **JSObjectGetProperty(_:_:_:_:)**: Gets a property from an object.
- **JSObjectGetPropertyAtIndex(_:_:_:_:)**: Gets a property from an object by numeric index.
- **JSObjectGetPrototype(_:_:)**: Gets an object’s prototype.
- **JSObjectHasProperty(_:_:_:)**: Tests whether an object has a specified property.
- **JSObjectIsConstructor(_:_:)**: Tests whether you can call an object as a constructor.
- **JSObjectIsFunction(_:_:)**: Tests whether you can call an object as a function.
- **JSObjectMake(_:_:_:)**: Creates a JavaScript object.
- **JSObjectMakeArray(_:_:_:_:)**: Creates a JavaScript array object.
- **JSObjectMakeConstructor(_:_:_:)**: Creates a JavaScript constructor.
- **JSObjectMakeDate(_:_:_:_:)**: Creates a JavaScript date object as though invoking the built-in date constructor.
